task_completion.description: Import the western_tract.csv file into TopoCal
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing TopoCal's import dialog or point list referencing 'western_tract.csv' being loaded.

task_completion.description: Import the eastern_tract.csv file into TopoCal
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing TopoCal's import dialog or point list referencing 'eastern_tract.csv' being loaded into the same project.

task_completion.description: Generate a unified terrain triangulation (Malla de Triángulos)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TopoCal main viewport displaying a triangulation mesh (a network of triangles connecting the loaded survey points).

task_completion.description: Export the combined point list to combined_points.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog in TopoCal or a File Explorer window showing 'combined_points.csv' created in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ directory.

task_completion.description: Save the merged TopoCal project to combined_site.top
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog in TopoCal or a File Explorer window showing 'combined_site.top' created in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TopoCal graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the TopoCal application open and being actively used (menus, dialogs, viewport), rather than terminal commands or scripts performing the merge.

integrity.description: The triangulation was actually generated within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The triangulation mesh should be visible within the TopoCal workspace interface, not just viewed as a static image in an image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the output files using a text editor or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using Notepad, echo, or other basic text tools to manually create 'combined_points.csv' or 'combined_site.top' with dummy data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output CSV path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\combined_points.csv. Expected TopoCal project path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\combined_site.top. The data source represents a Simulated Colorado Foothills Dataset.
